title: CAR SEAT PROGRAM - 211info
text: MARION AND POLK EARLY LEARNING HUB CAR SEAT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps families purchase low-cost car seats and educates on how to safely install them. 2995 Ryan Drive SE Suite 100 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: -If family members qualify for WIC, SNAP, or TANF, they may be eligible to receive a car seat; must be willing to show proof of benefit. -At the car seat check-up event the technician will confirm the need for a new car seat -Seats are only provided to parents or legal guardians who must be present to obtain the seat -Only one seat per child. -The child receiving the seat must be present unless the baby is not born yet. -The vehicle in which the child travels must be brought to the car seat check. Hours: Varies by car seat event Email (503) 485-3219 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 485-3219 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: $30 cash co-pay per seat or $10 per backless booster seat must be paid at the time of the appointment DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Child Passenger Safety Seats Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - MARION AND POLK EARLY LEARNING HUB INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - LANTERN INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ODHS FAMILY VISITATION SUPPORT PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - PRESCHOOL PROMISE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MARION AND POLK EARLY LEARNING HUB
